data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the visibility of the date of the last inspection on the equipment tag/QR code. However, the provided evidence does not include any information regarding the presence or absence of the date of the last inspection on the QR code for forklift #FL-042. This indicates a clear gap in the requirement coverage as the evidence does not confirm that this specific requirement is met.
gaps: No evidence confirming the date of the last inspection is visible on the equipment tag/QR code.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for inspection date visibility
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Provide concrete evidence that the date of the last inspection is displayed on the equipment tag/QR code.
